title: (Bullish Signal) ROAD, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on May 03, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that ROAD's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 137 similar cases, 118 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $32.57 crossed the support line at $31.41 and is trading between $41.24 resistance and $31.41 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/31/21 - 05/03/21, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend. During the week of 04/26/21 - 05/03/21, the stock enjoyed a +3% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/i7svgoeaj5x61.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=c4c7854fc3b470a5fa389bb52c5b58c90d517886

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ROAD just turned positive on April 05, 2021. Looking at past instances where ROAD's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows in 29 of 34 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The 10-day Moving Average for ROAD crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on April 08, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 5 of 8 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 62%.

Following a +2.17% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ROAD advanced for three days, in 152 of 195 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 118 of 137 cases where ROAD Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 86%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10919934-construction-partners-inc-ordinary-shares-s-road-32-26-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-may-03-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
